---
title: "dplyr for NFL Data"
subtitle: "Data Cleaning and Transformation for the NFL Project"
author: "Erin Mansfield"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    highlight-style: atom-one
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

I used dplyr to clean, transform, and prepare the NFL game level dataset fro the Data Storytelling Project.


-Clean game dates
-Extract week numbers
-Create scoring variables 
-Filter to regular season games
-Summarize scoring by season and week
